title: Celestial Guardian Concept AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: fantasy character concept art built around adult celestial guardian with silver hair, serene expression, and elegant fantasy presence. Subject: adult celestial guardian with silver hair, serene expression, and elegant fantasy presence appears as the hero character with readable anatomy, expressive pose, and clear costume design. Scene: floating moonlit cloud garden with pale stars, drifting petals, and distant temple silhouettes provides the fantasy atmosphere, depth, and worldbuilding context without overpowering the character. Composition: Fixed character-concept composition with clear silhouette, readable hands, costume hierarchy, and strong focal lighting. Style: Semi-realistic fantasy concept art with refined costume detail, cinematic depth, polished rendering, and premium character-design finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: adult celestial guardian with silver hair, serene expression, and elegant fantasy presence, layered pearl-white robes with translucent sleeves, silver jewelry, embroidered cuffs, and soft fabric movement, floating moonlit cloud garden with pale stars, drifting petals, and distant temple silhouettes, three-quarter stance with one hand lifted gently, calm gaze, readable hands, and graceful posture, and small glowing moon compass hovering above the palm define the reusable character concept. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: fantasy character concept art built around adult desert star ranger with braided dark hair, steady gaze, and noble sci-fi fantasy presence. Subject: adult desert star ranger with braided dark hair, steady gaze, and noble sci-fi fantasy presence appears as the hero character with readable anatomy, expressive pose, and clear costume design. Scene: starlit desert observatory with brass instruments, blue nebula sky, and distant sandstone towers provides the fantasy atmosphere, depth, and worldbuilding context without overpowering the character. Style: Semi-realistic fantasy concept art with refined costume detail, cinematic depth, polished rendering, and premium character-design finish. Signature Elements: adult desert star ranger with braided dark hair, steady gaze, and noble sci-fi fantasy presence, sand-gold cloak, lightweight plated shoulder armor, leather utility belts, blue crystal details, and wind-shaped fabric, starlit desert observatory with brass instruments, blue nebula sky, and distant sandstone towers, full-body contrapposto pose with one hand on a compass staff, alert expression, and visible balanced silhouette, and brass star-map staff with a glowing blue crystal core define the reusable character concept.
